title: Implement Event Loop Lag Monitoring
description: Implement Event Loop lag monitoring using `perf_hooks` to detect 'Main Thread Jank'. Analyze Event Loop lag data to identify performance bottlenecks in high-throughput APIs. Architect automated load shedding mechanisms triggered by excessive Event Loop lag.
objectives: Implement Event Loop lag monitoring using `perf_hooks` to detect 'Main Thread Jank'.
Analyze Event Loop lag data to identify performance bottlenecks in high-throughput APIs.
Architect automated load shedding mechanisms triggered by excessive Event Loop lag.
